settings.title: Settings
settings.resetConfirm: Really reset? All progress will be lost!

missingLetter.title: Missing Letter
missingLetter.description: Find the missing letter in the word!

mysticalTimesTable.title: Mystical Times Table
mysticalTimesTable.description: Conquer the times tables – if you dare!

config.title: Your Factors
config.factorsLabel: Which numbers (a) do you want to practise?
config.factorsHint: Comma-separated numbers from 1–10. Leave empty = all.

disclaimer.title: ⚠️ Mystical Warning ⚠️
disclaimer.body:
Whosoever passes through this gate enters the realm of ancient numbers. The mystical cat Numerica guards five secret codes that unlock a surprise in the real world. These codes appear only to the worthy – and they must be noted by hand, in writing. No screenshot, no photo. Only ink on paper.

The dangers are real. Your mind will be tested. Your pen must be ready.

Are you prepared for this trial?
disclaimer.codesHint: 🔮 5 secret codes · 🐱 guarded by Numerica · ✍️ write them by hand
disclaimer.accept: I am ready. I accept the dangers.

code.title: 🌟 Secret Code Unlocked! 🌟
code.body: The mystical cat Numerica nods in approval. You have earned this code:
code.writeItDown: ✍️ Write this code on PAPER right NOW! It is not saved and will vanish shortly.
code.continue: I have written it down – continue!
